challenge.title: Shooting Your Shot
challenge.subtitle: Convince Katrina to go on a date before time runs out.
challenge.description: Use charm, confidence, and wit to persuade her to skip the glamorous gala and grab pizza with you instead.
challenge.short_description: Land the date in just five minutes.

context.setting: Inside a movie set trailer during a quiet break between takes.

environment.location: Private movie trailer on a Hollywood studio lot
background_sounds: Soft hum of the air conditioner
visual_details: A makeup mirror surrounded by warm lights
An untouched tray of snacks on the table
A half-finished script resting on the couch

context.goal: Convince them to ditch the gala and grab pizza with you instead.
context.stakes: Avoid being left on read and protect your ego.
